By Provenance

TaskBloc

your days, organized

A personal task manager built around how you actually think and work. Not a project management suite. Not a system you have to maintain. Just a clear, calm view of what needs doing and when.

Try TaskBloc All Products

Designed for clarity. Built for the way people actually organize their lives.

📅

Day-by-day planning

See your week at a glance. Each day gets its own focused view so you know exactly what you committed to and what is still open.

📁

Project organization

Group tasks by project with color-coded labels. See everything related to a project in one place without leaving your daily flow.

📋

Rich task detail

Add status, due dates, time estimates, recurring schedules, context notes, and attachments. Everything a task needs, nothing it does not.

📊

Weekly summary

A weekly view that shows completion patterns across days and projects. Understand where your time is going without a spreadsheet.

↻

Recurring tasks

Set tasks to repeat on a schedule. Weekly check-ins, daily habits, monthly reviews. They show up when they should without you thinking about it.

☁

Synced and fast

Your tasks sync in real time. Start on one device, pick up on another. The sync indicator tells you where you stand at a glance.

Inside the app

Everything you need. Nothing you do not.

Today + Coming Up

Your day, front and center

The main view puts today's tasks in focus while showing the full week below. Drag tasks between days when plans change. A "Looking Forward" section holds anything beyond this week without cluttering your immediate view.

Projects

Work organized by what matters

Group tasks into color-coded projects. See all work tied to a project in one view without losing your place in the daily schedule. Archive projects when they wrap.

Task Detail

As much context as a task needs

Each task holds everything relevant to it: status, due date, time estimate, recurring schedule, project tags, notes, and file attachments. Open it when you need it. Stay in the daily view when you do not.

Coming in the next release

Your days, organized.

TaskBloc is free to use. No account required to get started. Built by Provenance — technology designed for people.
